blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 17 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,878 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 39".
